title: Delicate Creamy Tunisian Eggs Frittata
description: A floral and creamy Tunisian dish featuring eggs, glaze, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, rose water, orange blossom water, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a 10-inch oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
Pour the egg mixture into the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle the chopped parsley and mint on top.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the top is lightly golden.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve warm.
